question: Which statement best describes the position of the baseball player? Select from the following options: (A) The baseball player is on the field. (B) The baseball player is on the mound. (C) The baseball player is sitting on the bench. (D) The baseball player is standing by the fence.
gold_answer: The baseball player is on the field
answer_choices: The baseball player is on the field
The baseball player is on the mound
The baseball player is sitting on the bench
The baseball player is standing by the fence

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: baseball player sitting on a bench with teammates nearby
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: pitcher on mound, throwing motion, glove in hand, dirt mound, pitching rubber

inpaint_prompt_used: baseball player sitting on a bench with teammates nearby
negative_prompt_used: pitcher on mound, throwing motion, glove in hand, dirt mound, pitching rubber
